infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeConnect uses your location for mesh networking, safe zones, and emergency alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeConnect uses your location in the background to keep you safe and connected.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeConnect uses Bluetooth to connect with nearby mesh nodes.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: SafeConnect uses Bluetooth to connect with nearby mesh nodes.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SafeConnect needs location to track your position during emergencies and record GPS trails.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: SafeConnect uses background location to keep your SOS trail active.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SafeConnect uses your location for emergency alerts and mesh networking.

plugins.localNetworkUsagePermissionText: SafeConnect uses local network to discover nearby devices during emergencies
